title: phlox stansburyi
intro: Phlox stansburyi, also known as Stansbury's phlox, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been shown to possess health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off bacterial infections. Herbal preparations of Phlox stansburyi can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
